text: Most spring events sneak up on you. That’s why teams choose the custom 10x10 canopy—branded and visible from the parking lot. White tents might blend in, but they won't set your booth apart when it counts. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com

The summer rush is here, and nonprofits know the urgency. Setting up that info booth at the community festival? Visibility and reliable gear make all the difference when you want folks to swing by. It's go time. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com

Fall festivals and game days wait for no one. When that wind-tossed canopy frame finally fails, lead counts down from weeks to days. Rush orders today mean booths saved tomorrow. Be ready before the event finds you unprepared. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com

The trade show floor is unforgiving. 50 feet away, your tent's frame tells its own story. A sudden gust rebrands every booth. Dye sublimation graphics stay sharp when vinyl starts drooping. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com
What does “cheap” really mean for your market booth? If it means sinking under a weak frame by week two, that’s not value. — Vicious Shade Supply Co. · viciousshade.com
